description: Capability for the chimes (tone editor) window. It invokes app-defined commands (cmd_get_chimes / cmd_save_chimes / cmd_import_chime_file / cmd_preview_chime / cmd_close_chimes / cmd_window_ready), which are not capability-gated and are restricted by the require_chimes() / read-gate caller-checks in src/commands.rs. The native file picker for imports runs in Rust (tauri-plugin-dialog), so no dialog JS permission is needed. core:event:allow-listen is granted so the unsaved-changes guard can register getCurrentWindow().onCloseRequested (src/unsaved-guard.ts).
